```diff
  259 
  260 **When writing documentation that references other skills:**
  261 
- 262 Use path format without `@` prefix or `/SKILL.md` suffix:
- 263 - вң… Good: `skills/testing/test-driven-development`
- 264 - вң… Good: `skills/debugging/systematic-debugging`
- 265 - вқҢ Bad: `@skills/testing/test-driven-development/SKILL.md` (force-loads, burns context)
+ 262 Use path format without `@` prefix or `/SKILL.md` suffix:
+ 263 - вң… Good: `test-driven-development`
+ 264 - вң… Good: `systematic-debugging`
+ 265 - вқҢ Bad: `@test-driven-development` (force-loads, burns context)
  266 
  267 **Why no @ links:** `@` syntax force-loads files immediately, consuming 200k+ context before you need them.
  268 
```

content:
---
name: Getting Started with Skills
description: Skills wiki intro - mandatory workflows, search tool, brainstorming triggers
when_to_use: when starting any conversation
version: 4.0.2
---

# Getting Started with Skills
[exit 0]
